case_title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE VS. JERRY DOBBS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE AS TO DEFENDANT DOBBS, JERRY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
